label: Boss
description: Defines a mechanoid boss that can be summoned by the Mechhive faction. Each BossDef names a unique boss type linked to a PawnKindDef.

kindDef.label: Kind def
kindDef.description: PawnKindDef that defines this boss's stats, weapons, and appearance. Must be unique across all BossDef instances.

appearAfterTicks.label: Appear after ticks
appearAfterTicks.description: Number of ticks after game start before this boss can appear. Defaults to int.MaxValue (2,147,483,647). Shipped values are 7,200,000 (2 years), 14,400,000 (4 years), and 21,600,000 (6 years).

new-boss.label: New boss
new-boss.description: Minimal boss definition with a def name, label, kind def, and appear-after ticks.
